headline: This Bull Market Has Charged Away From a Correction. Wall Street’s Betting That Continues.
summary: U.S. stocks avoided a technical correction, defined as a 10% pullback from a recent high, by the merest of margins this week, and Wall Street is both breathing a sigh of relief and doubling down on bets that the long bull market will continue charging well into the end of the year and beyond.

raw.headline: This Bull Market Has Charged Away From a Correction. Wall Street’s Betting That Continues.

headline: US Bonds Fall as Strong Jobs Data Undermines Fed Cut Outlook
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Treasuries fell as a solid reading of the US labor market prompted traders to reduce bets the Federal Reserve will lower interest rates this year.The decline in Friday’s shortened trading session pushed yields higher by three to five basis points, led by the policy-sensitive two-year. Traders erased what remained of their bets on Fed easing this year, having priced in only about four basis points before the report, and trimmed wagers on a cut next year. headline: Mark Zuckerberg, Elon Musk Being Taxed Less Than An 'Average Nurse'? Jayapal, Elizabeth Warren Say Not Anymore
summary: Rep. Pramila Jayapal (D-Wash.) criticized the tax rates of billionaires and expressed dissatisfaction with the current tax system.

headline: How The Story Is Shifting For KGHM Polska Miedz (WSE:KGH) As Analyst Views Diverge
summary: KGHM Polska Miedz’s fair value estimate has been adjusted from PLN 293.36 to PLN 283.92, pointing to a slightly lower implied upside at current levels. This move sits alongside a wider split in analyst views, with some arguing that recent strength in metals prices could justify higher targets, while others see the shares as already reflecting much of that optimism. In the next sections, you will see how these shifting targets and opinions fit together, as well as how to keep track of the...
